description: Sybill is an AI assistant for sales reps that automates meeting prep, call notes, follow-up emails, and CRM updates, built around sales deal workflows.
tagline: AI personal assistant for sales reps
overview: Sybill automates the admin around selling, handling meeting prep, call capture, follow-up emails, and CRM updates, with AI tuned to sales logic rather than generic notes.
what_is: Sybill is an AI sales assistant for account executives. It supports the whole meeting cycle, preparing reps beforehand, capturing key details during the call, and drafting follow-ups and CRM updates afterward, which removes much of the manual admin.

It is built specifically for sales workflows and deal management, acting like a deal copilot rather than a generic transcription tool. Reps tend to see time saved and cleaner pipeline data within days.
Sybill integrates with email, calendar, Slack, and CRM systems to keep records accurate and workflows smooth. Its focus is sales-specific assistance, not basic call transcription.
